rules.title: Coming soon
rules.body: This section will house interactive visual tools for the team — charts, maps, trend explorers, and dashboards built from ACHI analytical outputs.

placeholder_cards.title: Procedure Trend Explorer
placeholder_cards.description: Interactive chart showing procedure volume trends by year, payer, and region

placeholder_cards.title: County-Level Utilization Map
placeholder_cards.description: Choropleth map of Arkansas showing utilization rates by county for key service lines

placeholder_cards.title: Payer Mix Dashboard
placeholder_cards.description: Breakdown of commercial, Medicaid, and Medicare coverage across years and service lines
